metrics.visualTitle: Last Refresh: Jun 30th, 2019 / Chicago, IL, USA

metrics.QueryText:
DEFINE
	VAR __DS0FilterTable = 
		TREATAS({"XBOX"}, 'Product'[Product])

	VAR __DS0FilterTable2 = 
		TREATAS({"June"}, 'LocalDateTable_d9fbe243-4814-4038-8eec-593e864a563b'[Month])

	VAR __DS0Core = 
		CALCULATETABLE(
			DISTINCT('Product'[Category Image]),
			KEEPFILTERS(__DS0FilterTable),
			KEEPFILTERS(__DS0FilterTable2)
		)

	VAR __DS0PrimaryWindowed = 
		TOPN(101, __DS0Core, 'Product'[Category Image], 1)

EVALUATE
	SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
		__DS0FilterTable,
		__DS0FilterTable2,
		"MinProduct2", IGNORE(CALCULATE(MIN('Product'[Product])))
	)

EVALUATE
	__DS0PrimaryWindowed

ORDER BY
	'Product'[Category Image]

DEFINE
	VAR __DS0FilterTable = 
		TREATAS({"XBOX"}, 'Product'[Product])

	VAR __DS0FilterTable2 = 
		TREATAS({"June"}, 'LocalDateTable_d9fbe243-4814-4038-8eec-593e864a563b'[Month])

EVALUATE
	SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
		__DS0FilterTable,
		__DS0FilterTable2,
		"MinCategory", IGNORE(CALCULATE(MIN('Product'[Category])))
	)

DEFINE
	VAR __DS0FilterTable = 
		TREATAS({"XBOX"}, 'Product'[Product])

	VAR __DS0FilterTable2 = 
		TREATAS({"June"}, 'LocalDateTable_d9fbe243-4814-4038-8eec-593e864a563b'[Month])

	VAR __SQDS0Core = 
		SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
			'Associated Product'[Product],
			__DS0FilterTable,
			__DS0FilterTable2,
			"SumImportance", CALCULATE(SUM('Association'[Importance]))
		)

	VAR __SQDS0BodyLimited = 
		TOPN(1, __SQDS0Core, [SumImportance], 0)

	VAR __DS0Core = 
		CALCULATETABLE(
			DISTINCT('Associated Product'[Product]),
			KEEPFILTERS(__DS0FilterTable),
			KEEPFILTERS(__DS0FilterTable2),
			KEEPFILTERS(__SQDS0BodyLimited)
		)

	VAR __DS0PrimaryWindowed = 
		TOPN(101, __DS0Core, 'Associated Product'[Product], 1)

EVALUATE
	__DS0PrimaryWindowed

ORDER BY
	'Associated Product'[Product]

DEFINE
	VAR __DS0FilterTable = 
		TREATAS({"XBOX"}, 'Product'[Product])

	VAR __DS0FilterTable2 = 
		TREATAS({"June"}, 'LocalDateTable_d9fbe243-4814-4038-8eec-593e864a563b'[Month])

	VAR __SQDS0Core = 
		SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
			'Associated Product'[Product],
			__DS0FilterTable,
			__DS0FilterTable2,
			"SumImportance", CALCULATE(SUM('Association'[Importance]))
		)

	VAR __SQDS0BodyLimited = 
		TOPN(1, __SQDS0Core, [SumImportance], 0)

EVALUATE
	SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
		__DS0FilterTable,
		__DS0FilterTable2,
		__SQDS0BodyLimited,
		"SumProbability", IGNORE(CALCULATE(SUM('Association'[Probability])))
	)

	VAR __DS0FilterTable = 
		TREATAS({"XBOX"}, 'Product'[Product])

DEFINE
	VAR __DS0FilterTable = 
		TREATAS({"XBOX"}, 'Product'[Product])

	VAR __DS0FilterTable2 = 
		TREATAS({"June"}, 'LocalDateTable_d9fbe243-4814-4038-8eec-593e864a563b'[Month])

	VAR __SQDS0Core = 
		SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
			'Associated Product'[Product],
			__DS0FilterTable,
			__DS0FilterTable2,
			"SumImportance", CALCULATE(SUM('Association'[Importance]))
		)

	VAR __SQDS0BodyLimited = 
		TOPN(1, __SQDS0Core, [SumImportance], 0)

EVALUATE
	SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
		__DS0FilterTable,
		__DS0FilterTable2,
		__SQDS0BodyLimited,
		"Lift_Label", IGNORE('Design DAX'[Lift Label])
	)

DEFINE
	VAR __DS0FilterTable = 
		TREATAS({"XBOX"}, 'Product'[Product])

	VAR __DS0FilterTable2 = 
		TREATAS({"June"}, 'LocalDateTable_d9fbe243-4814-4038-8eec-593e864a563b'[Month])

EVALUATE
	SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
		__DS0FilterTable,
		__DS0FilterTable2,
		"MinEmpty", IGNORE(CALCULATE(MIN('Tooltip Info'[Empty])))
	)

DEFINE
	VAR __DS0FilterTable = 
		TREATAS({"XBOX"}, 'Product'[Product])

	VAR __DS0FilterTable2 = 
		TREATAS({"June"}, 'LocalDateTable_d9fbe243-4814-4038-8eec-593e864a563b'[Month])

EVALUATE
	SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
		__DS0FilterTable,
		__DS0FilterTable2,
		"MinEmpty", IGNORE(CALCULATE(MIN('Tooltip Info'[Empty])))
	)

DEFINE
	VAR __DS0FilterTable = 
		TREATAS({"XBOX"}, 'Product'[Product])

	VAR __DS0FilterTable2 = 
		TREATAS({"June"}, 'LocalDateTable_d9fbe243-4814-4038-8eec-593e864a563b'[Month])

	VAR __SQDS0Core = 
		SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
			'Association'[RightItemSetId],
			__DS0FilterTable,
			__DS0FilterTable2,
			"SumImportance", CALCULATE(SUM('Association'[Importance]))
		)

	VAR __SQDS0BodyLimited = 
		TOPN(8, __SQDS0Core, [SumImportance], 0)

	VAR __DS0Core = 
		SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
			'Association'[RuleID],
			'Associated Product'[Product Image],
			'Associated Product'[Product],
			'Associated Product'[Segmented by],
			__DS0FilterTable,
			__DS0FilterTable2,
			__SQDS0BodyLimited,
			"SumProbability", CALCULATE(SUM('Association'[Probability]))
		)

	VAR __DS0PrimaryWindowed = 
		TOPN(
			30001,
			__DS0Core,
			[SumProbability],
			0,
			'Association'[RuleID],
			1,
			'Associated Product'[Product Image],
			1,
			'Associated Product'[Product],
			1,
			'Associated Product'[Segmented by],
			1
		)

EVALUATE
	__DS0PrimaryWindowed

ORDER BY
	[SumProbability] DESC,
	'Association'[RuleID],
	'Associated Product'[Product Image],
	'Associated Product'[Product],
	'Associated Product'[Segmented by]

	VAR __DS0FilterTable = 
		TREATAS({"XBOX"}, 'Product'[Product])

	VAR __DS0FilterTable2 = 
		TREATAS({"June"}, 'LocalDateTable_d9fbe243-4814-4038-8eec-593e864a563b'[Month])

	VAR __DS0Core = 
		CALCULATETABLE(
			DISTINCT('Product'[Product Image]),
			KEEPFILTERS(__DS0FilterTable),
			KEEPFILTERS(__DS0FilterTable2)
		)

	VAR __DS0PrimaryWindowed = 
		TOPN(101, __DS0Core, 'Product'[Product Image], 1)

EVALUATE
	__DS0PrimaryWindowed

ORDER BY
	'Product'[Product Image]

DEFINE
	VAR __DS0FilterTable = 
		TREATAS({"XBOX"}, 'Product'[Product])

	VAR __DS0FilterTable2 = 
		TREATAS({"June"}, 'LocalDateTable_d9fbe243-4814-4038-8eec-593e864a563b'[Month])

EVALUATE
	SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
		__DS0FilterTable,
		__DS0FilterTable2,
		"MinCategory", IGNORE(CALCULATE(MIN('Product'[Category]))),
		"MinSegment", IGNORE(CALCULATE(MIN('Product'[Segment]))),
		"SumPrice", IGNORE(CALCULATE(SUM('Product'[Price])))
	)

	VAR __DS0Core = 
		SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
			'Product'[Product],
			__DS0FilterTable,
			__DS0FilterTable2,
			"Returns", 'Analysis DAX'[Returns],
			"ProductR_Top_N", IGNORE('Design DAX'[ProductR Top N])

	VAR __DS0PrimaryWindowed =

	__DS0PrimaryWindowed

ORDER BY
